column3: holdRead关闭(ENABLE_HOLDREAD=0)时rdata_last_REG是共享core未裁的额外死状态(rdata_hold不更新), 非MBIST功能错误; 参数守卫修复core.sv:114 rdata_last_REG<=ENABLE_HOLDREAD?ren:rckEn 使死状态与respReg同方程被merge; 待重跑验证strict SUCCEEDED unread=0

可读xs_Simple1PSRAM_core FM证等价(307512点/0fail/0黑盒/含全存储内容); 唯一unread=golden array_19_ext的SYNTHESIS死寄存器reg_RW0_ren(impl正确省略); 消unread需加死代码(违可读)或黑盒(丢存储证明), 均拒; 同StorePf UNREAD_REF_DEAD_STATE; 实现已证正确, 契约boundary需决策

inline后auto_in_0_b_bits_source[0..5]/size[0]/corrupt 20failing+16unver; 静态分析: 两侧B队列例化/端口/连接完全一致(都golden Queue2_TLBundleB_1注入常量source=0/size=6/corrupt=0), 矛盾无法静态定位; 疑reset/X-init(队列RAM未初始化)或bank映射; 需FM反例(distinguishing input/state)才能pinpoint, 非快速静态修
inline消黑盒后native SUCCEEDED/0fail/0黑盒; 仅golden Serializer enqPtrExt_0_value_reg[1]/[3]死寄存器(EnableStorePrefetchSPB=false, cone证无扇出), impl正确省略; 按PASS_DEAD_REF判据转绿

out_back_q(Queue1_RegMapperInput) RegMapper通用data字段64位, ICacheCtrlUnit仅用data[47:0](paddr)+data[3:0]控制位; data[63:48]这16位存入队列却零扇出=cone-proven-dead, golden(ram_reg[53:68])与手写核(slot_reg[data][48:63])对称死位. 队列须64位(standalone变体data高位是活输出端口)不可化简. fm_pins set_user_match证严格16↔16双射(同源enq锁存). native SUCCEEDED/failing0/unverified0/aborted0, 残留仅16 matched cone-dead unread → PASS_DEAD_REF(同StorePfWrapper判据).

golden cntFtqFireInterval_reg[31:0]是性能计数器, 唯一读是cntFtqFireInterval_probe(DFT观测线零功能扇出)→FM判unread(cone-proven-dead). 可读impl正确省略此死perf计数器→impl clean(unread_impl=0/无matched-dead). golden-only 32 unread_ref, native SUCCEEDED/failing0/unverified0/aborted0 → PASS_DEAD_REF(同StorePfWrapper golden-only判据, 无对称歧义).

两步: (1)impl pf_fifo超配16→深度10镜像golden, 消[10:15] 24个impl-only死寄存器(指针在10回绕恒0..9无越界), FM验证unread_impl 24→0. (2)残留golden-only refill_done_r_counter_reg(1位): golden有功能读(line408/517)但impl完全省略仍native SUCCEEDED(2613passing/0fail/0unverified/0aborted)=形式证明该计数器状态可证冗余不影响可观测输出→FM判unread_ref. impl clean(unread_impl=0), golden-only 1 cone-dead → PASS_DEAD_REF(同StorePfWrapper/ICacheMainPipe判据).
